visual_description: A woman with blonde hair sits on a couch, wearing a patterned top and looking toward the right side of the frame. Beside her, a man in a dark t-shirt and khaki pants sits with his hands clasped, gazing slightly upward and to his left. In the background, another person stands partially visible behind the couch, with a lamp and decorative items on a side table nearby.
audio_description: The audio features a female voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no significant background noise or inflection.
